text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Achoo! I can't believe she dropped me into a waterfall...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Who would do such a thing? I'll personally knock the snot out of that
dastardly villain!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You were so far ahead of us. What on earth happened?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Sigh... It upsets me to even think of it, but...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Here's the chapel... This must be the finish line.

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Oh my, my, my! You're the first to finish the race!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Me? But wasn't Mayano ahead of—

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Never mind. If I'm the first to finish, that means I can make my
proposal, correct?

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Did you think that merely arriving here the fastest would give
you the right to propose?

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
A rigorous trial to overcome! The beauty of a proposal made after
surviving it all!

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
What matters is whether your journey sparks my beauty sensors to
life! ♪

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Although you are an exemplary student, Air Groove, you are still
lacking oomph.

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Crossing the finish line with such a cool expression won't generate any heat! You have to show me some fiery passion!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: So... you're saying I'm not worthy of be your muse?

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Hm... Let's just say you're not there yet!

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Long ago, your mother showed my master a beauty so wondrous, it
inspired them to craft a special set of racewear for her.

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
During my apprenticeship, they shared your mother's story with me
while showing off a photo of her wearing that racewear.

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
She looked so powerful and dignified, and she drew everyone's
attention just by standing there.

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
It was so beautiful... I made a solemn vow then and there to one day
create racewear just like the one your mother wore.

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
But even though you're her daughter, you're simply no good! You are
not fit for me nor the racewear as you are now.

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I understand you are aiming to be the Empress, but it seems you only
see your racewear and this audition as mere stepping stones on your
journey.

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
And so, for you, my dear Air Groove... Enjoooy! ☆ Here comes the
Beauty Aqua Slide!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Wha?! The floor's—

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Make sure to show me your true beauty the next time we meet! ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: UWAAAUGH!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: It seems that "Aqua Slide" was connected to this waterfall.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, what a shame! Even if you wanted to take revenge, it's not like
you could beat her up or anything!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Beat her up? No, I don't need to do that. The next time we meet, I’m
going to make her acknowledge me. That's how I'll exact my revenge.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hm, so this is the cliff and signboard you were talking about.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
"The road shall not open for those who lack beauty." I suppose I
have... some inkling as to what this means.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Really?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I don't know what "beauty" is supposed to mean in this case, but it's
probably saying we need to climb this cliff.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It's an entirely outrageous command, but if that woman is the one who
put this here, it's just par for the course.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: In that case, I'm going to climb up!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: If it helps me become a muse, I'll scale any walls that stand in my way!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
This is what you meant when you were talking about working toward
becoming your ideal self, right, Kawakami?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Dober... Yes, that's right!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I want to better myself, and I need that racewear to gain the strength
to change!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Even if I don't have confidence right now, I've decided to stay
resolute and pour everything I have into this!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: That's the spirit! Now all you need is determination and guts!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
All right, I'd better get started too. ♪ When it comes to dreams, no
one can beat this strength of mine!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hm... A strong resolution and the passion to back it up... Those
certainly are beautiful things.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
"The road shall not open for those who lack beauty." ...There may be
a path for me after all.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
(After talking to Ms. Beauty, the admiration I held as a child toward
my mother and her racewear has grown even stronger...)

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Even now, that admiration—these beautiful feelings of mine—remains
in my heart.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I'm right behind you, Dober, Kawakami!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Air Groove?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Now we're talking! ♪ Let's pummel Beauty with all our hopes and
dreams once we reach her at the top of the cliff!
